reviews.review_title: JUST ONE of the best VR combat games
reviews.review_description:
This game makes you feel SO COOL. You get to play through the classic anime "one man army" trope and this game doesn't pull any punches (except the ultimate ones).

The slicing and punching feels so satisfying, these devs have done something different. I could blast through these enemies for hours, even though there is only one level in the demo. I even managed to get the SSS rank after a while (ngl it was pain in the *** to get).

Can't wait for the Early Access release! This game has so much potential.

developer_response.body: We greatly thank you! Make sure to wishlist the Early Access 😎

reviews.review_description:
It's just great, UntilYouFall but without arenas and with much faster and more enjoyable loop.

Great future ahead of this title, cant wait for full game!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you liked it! We indeed are fans of Until You Fall and their design choices have inspired us while crafting our own combat system. Make sure to stay tuned for the Early Access, we got a lot more coming!

reviews.review_title: Super satisfying combat flow and workout
reviews.review_description:
Addictive combat. Great workout. Huge potential.
Can’t believe Just One Man is still in beta…if this is the starting point, the full release is going to be awesome.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the praise, we appreciate it a lot 😁

reviews.review_description: This is one of the best fighting games you will. Love. Its. Easy to learn and its a fitness game! im happy this game is 20x better then many free demos 100% recommended.

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you liked it 😁 Just you wait for what we have cooked up for the Early Access 😈

reviews.review_description:
Cured my IBS, cured my blindness, and unblocked my chakras.
Also saved my grandpa from the fridge (long story, don’t ask 😭).
Absolute masterpiece. Literally crying rn. Thank u devs, I’m a new man. 💀🙏

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you got cured (otherwise writing this response would have been quite useless). We are delighted that your grandpa is safe too, make sure to let him try our game as well! We'd love to hear his opinion 😁
A true legend 🤝Make sure to wishlist our upcoming Early Access 😁

reviews.review_description:
The mechanics feel very solid, I love the Until You Fall style combat.

The demo only features two enemy types, so I’m hoping the full game adds more variety. These mechanics would be amazing in boss fights.
The two ultimate attacks (super punch and sword dash) felt quite similar, so that might be worth differentiating.

I’ve wishlisted the full game, excited to see more!

developer_response.body:
Great to hear you liked it! We indeed are great fans of Until You Fall 😁

Regarding content: We are right now developing new enemy types. We want to make sure all the enemies add proper variety to the gameplay and we want the mechanics to be as intuitive as possible. We are aiming to get at least one new enemy to the Early Access release, but we can't promise it yet. If it doesn't make it to the release, expect it to come during the couple weeks after that!

Boss fights are on our TODO list as well! We definitely want to try them out, but we think we need to first focus on getting a couple more regular enemies and weapons into the game. And with new weapons, we will introduce new abilities as well.

Thanks for the feedback! If you want to give more ideas, make sure to join our discord: https://discord.com/invite/2D9MUWVtEe
